name: Imago
summary: Current released Imago builds are not Evo connected, but an upcoming 2027.1.0 release is planned to add downhole import support.
note: Released Imago versions remain not connected in the extracted source table; upcoming support is captured separately below.

support.note: Upcoming Imago 2027.1.0 adds import support for all current downhole collection schema versions.
Upcoming Imago 2027.1.0 adds import support for all current downhole intervals schema versions.
